Class FilterObjectStream<S,T>

java.lang.Object
opennlp.tools.util.FilterObjectStream<S,T>
Type Parameters:
S - The sample type of the source or input stream.
T - The sample type of this stream
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, opennlp.tools.util.ObjectStream<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ChunkSampleStream, ChunkSampleStream, DocumentSampleStream, EmptyLinePreprocessorStream, EventTraceStream, LanguageDetectorSampleStream, LemmaSampleStream, NameSampleDataStream, NameSampleTypeFilter, ParseSampleStream, PosSampleStream, SentenceSampleStream, SentimentSampleStream, SentimentSampleTypeFilter, TokenSampleStream, WhitespaceTokenStream, WordTagSampleStream
public abstract class FilterObjectStream<S,T> extends Object implements opennlp.tools.util.ObjectStream<T>
Abstract base class for filtering streams.

Filtering streams take an existing stream and convert its output to something else.
